allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\) for line in lines: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) msg = obj.get\('message', {}\) role = msg.get\('role', ''\) content = msg.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, str\) and content.strip\(\): print\(f'[{role}]: {content[:500]}'\) elif isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\): if c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'[{role}]: {c[\\"text\\"][:500]}'\) except: pass ")
